descriptions.description: The Command-phase roll that gains 1CP is consumed.

The end-of-Movement visible enemy selection is engine-enumerated, persisted through the start of the source player's next Command phase, and grants friendly Aeldari models +1 to Wound only against the selected unit.
A once-per-battle activation must grant the Bloody Twins Damage 3, Anti-Infantry 5+, and Devastating Wounds until phase end.
A led unit needs a post-shoot 6-inch Normal move followed by a turn-long charge restriction.
Character-target wound-roll rerolls for the led unit are consumed.
The led unit's fixed 6-inch Advance and vertical-distance exception are consumed.
The led unit's Melta range modifier is consumed.
The once-per-battle first-death return at full wounds is consumed.
The led unit needs end-of-opponent-turn return to Strategic Reserves and a 6-inch Deep Strike option with a turn-long charge restriction.
A setup-this-turn attack modifier must make every successful Hit roll a Critical Hit.
A post-shoot forced Battle-shock test with a -1 test modifier is still needed.
Attack declaration must be limited to one target, then each nearby enemy unit needs 3-inch splash D3 mortal wounds on a 5+ after attacks resolve.
Leader-conditioned Fights First, Infiltrators, Scouts, and Stealth grants are consumed.
The Stratagem CP-cost reduction is consumed.
Advance-roll and Agile Manoeuvre-roll rerolls are consumed.
Allocated attack Damage must be halved for this model.
A 6-inch friendly Aeldari aura that adds 1 to Advance and Charge rolls is still needed.
A once-per-phase led-unit Hit, Wound, or Damage result override to an unmodified 6 is needed, with the Support Weapon exclusion enforced.
The visible enemy selection is parsed; a persistent tracked target and friendly Aeldari +1 Hit query are still needed.
A once-per-phase led-unit Hit, Wound, or Damage result override to an unmodified 6 is still needed.
The visible enemy selection is parsed; a persistent tracked target whose attacks suffer -1 to Wound is still needed.
A Farseer-leading predicate and defensive -1 Wound modifier are still needed.
Per-model nearby-Psyker counting must scale each Destructor's Attacks and Strength to a +2 cap.
A selected-to-shoot nearby-Psyker count must scale this model's Destructor Attacks and Strength to a +2 cap.
The charge-declaration reaction and Charge-roll modifier are parsed; the reaction/query host is still needed.
Per-model selected-to-shoot nearby-Psyker counting must scale each Destructor's Attacks and Strength to a +2 cap.
The unit-wide Ignores Cover weapon grant is consumed.
Wraith target selection and the Sustained Hits grant are consumed.
The conditional Lone Operative grant is consumed.
The healing or destroyed-model return command effect is consumed.
The dependent platform must be destroyed when the last Guardian model is destroyed.
A no-token extra Fade Back use that bypasses the normal once-per-phase Battle Focus limit is still needed.
The dependent Serpent's Scale Platform must be destroyed when the last Guardian model is destroyed.
Sticky objective control while this unit or its Transport is in range is still needed.
The bearer-unit 5+ invulnerable-save grant is consumed.
Ranged Hit-roll rerolls of 1 are partly parsed; the closest-eligible-target predicate and upgrade to full Hit rerolls still need a query host.
The optional D6-inch reactive Normal move is consumed through the shared movement proposal and PathWitness path.
Ranged weapons gain Sustained Hits 1 only while the attacking Dire Avenger model targets an enemy unit within half that weapon's range.
The once-per-battle Hit or Wound result override is consumed.
The bearer-only 4+ invulnerable-save grant is consumed.
Charge-after-Advance-or-Fall-Back eligibility is consumed.
The once-per-battle Hit or Wound result override is consumed.
The charge-conditioned Critical Hit threshold is consumed.
The once-per-battle Hit or Wound result override is consumed.
Monster/Vehicle Hit, Wound, and Damage rerolls are consumed.
The once-per-battle Hit or Wound result override is consumed.
Nearby-Psyker Leadership and Hit modifiers are consumed.
Shoot-after-Fall-Back eligibility is consumed.
Fight-on-death eligibility is consumed.
Nearby-Psyker Leadership and Hit modifiers are consumed.
The invulnerable-save characteristic is consumed.
Ranged attacks targeting the living Wave Serpent subtract 1 from the Wound roll only when attack Strength exceeds its Toughness.
Setup/move-completed mortal wounds and the Grenade restriction are consumed.
The once-per-battle Hit or Wound result override is consumed.
The movement-action choice, fixed Move, charge restriction, and mortal wounds are consumed.
The once-per-battle Hit or Wound result override is consumed.
Normal, Advance, Fall Back, and Charge movement ignores vertical distance while retaining complete PathWitness validation for every moved model.
The bearer-only 4+ invulnerable-save grant is consumed.
The Fly target predicate and +1 Hit/+1 Wound modifiers are parsed; the ranged attack modifier query host is still needed.
Post-shoot hit-target tracking and the suppressed-unit Hit-roll modifier are consumed.
A 9-inch enemy aura that subtracts 1 from Battle-shock and Leadership tests is still needed.
Ballistic Skill and Hit-modifier ignore semantics are parsed; an attack-sequence query host is still needed.
The once-per-battle Hit or Wound result override is consumed.
Post-shoot target tracking and Wound rerolls are parsed; the same-Transport disembark predicate and turn-long query host are still needed.
One Hit-roll and one Wound-roll reroll per shooting activation are still needed.
Range and visibility origin substitution through a visible Fire Prism, with Attacks fixed to 1, is still needed.
Post-hit pinned state plus Move and Charge modifiers are consumed.
Post-shoot target tracking and the friendly Aeldari Armour Penetration modifier are consumed.
The battle-start keyword choice and target-conditioned Hit/Wound rerolls are consumed.
Nearby-Psyker Weapon Skill, Ballistic Skill, and Leadership modifiers are consumed.
Half-range attack-count rerolls for the named weapons are still needed.
Model/terrain transit needs PathWitness and Engagement Range validation plus the tall-terrain Battle-shock risk.
The bearer-only 4+ invulnerable-save grant and allocated-attack Damage reduction are consumed.
Objective-conditioned Hit rerolls are consumed.
The invulnerable-save characteristic is consumed.
Quarry selection and Lethal Hits/Precision grants are consumed.
The first-failed-save Damage replacement is consumed.
The Ignores Cover weapon grant is consumed.
The invulnerable-save characteristic is consumed.
Long-rifle hit tracking and Benefit of Cover denial are consumed.
Melee Hit rerolls and the Wound-roll modifier are parsed; the attack-query host is still needed.
Six-inch Pile-in and Consolidation movement needs closest-unit constraints rather than closest-model constraints.
A one-model army cap is still needed.
Vertical-distance-free bearer movement with PathWitness validation is still needed.
An 18-inch ranged target restriction for the led unit is still needed.
A one-model army cap is still needed.
The Hazardous grant is partly parsed; enemy melee-weapon targeting and duration still need a host.
Vertical-distance-free bearer movement with PathWitness validation is still needed.
A Fight-phase-start finite choice among Hit rerolls, +1 Wound, or defensive -1 Hit is still needed.
Vertical-distance-free bearer movement with PathWitness validation is still needed.
A selected-to-shoot finite choice among Ignores Cover, Precision, or Sustained Hits 3 is still needed.
Post-shoot Battle-shock with a destroyed-model test modifier is still needed.
A one-model army cap is still needed.
Vertical-distance-free bearer movement with PathWitness validation is still needed.
A once-per-battle pre-move 2D6-inch Move and +3 Attacks modifier through turn end are still needed.
Charge-after-Advance eligibility is parsed; the movement/charge query host is still needed.
The Warlord restriction is consumed by army mustering.
Vertical-distance-free bearer movement with PathWitness validation is still needed.
The incoming-attack -1 Hit modifier is parsed; the attack-query host is still needed.
An 18-inch ranged target restriction is still needed.
Fight-end conditional Transport embarkation needs same-turn re-embarkation, capacity, unit-shape, distance, and Engagement Range validation.
Fight-phase enemy selection and friendly Aeldari Wound rerolls are parsed; the phase selection and query host are still needed.
Yvraine/Epic Hero mutual-exclusion mustering is still needed.
A Command-phase D3+1 Bodyguard model return on 2+, excluding Support Weapon models, is still needed.
Visarch/Epic Hero mutual-exclusion mustering is still needed.
A led-unit Fights First grant is still needed.
Feel No Pain 4+ for other attached Character models is partly parsed and still needs a damage-query host.
Yncarne/Epic Hero mutual-exclusion mustering is still needed.
D3 lost-wound restoration after this model destroys a unit is still needed.
A once-per-opponent-turn teleport setup at a destroyed friendly unit's location is still needed.
The Battle Focus token refund roll is consumed.
The Stratagem CP-cost reduction is consumed.
Flickerjump charge eligibility for the led unit is consumed.
Post-shoot target tracking and the Critical Hit threshold are consumed.
Damage rerolls of 1 are partly parsed; the Titanic predicate and upgrade to full Damage rerolls still need a query host.
Prebattle joining, Starting Strength, and Transport restrictions for Support Artillery are still needed.
Conditional Toughness 3 for the joined platform is still needed.
A persistent snared target and per-model mortal wounds on later Normal, Advance, or Fall Back moves are still needed.
Prebattle joining, Starting Strength, and Transport restrictions for Support Artillery are still needed.
Conditional Toughness 3 for the joined platform is still needed.
Same-phase allied Vibro Cannon target counting must scale Strength, Armour Penetration, and Damage.
Prebattle joining, Starting Strength, and Transport restrictions for Support Artillery are still needed.
Conditional Toughness 3 for the joined platform is still needed.
Model/terrain transit needs PathWitness and Engagement Range endpoint validation.
The bearer-only 4+ invulnerable-save grant and allocated-attack Damage reduction are consumed.
Led-unit Wound rerolls of 1 are partly parsed; the below-Starting-Strength predicate and upgrade to full rerolls still need a query host.
The once-per-round Stratagem CP-cost reduction is consumed.
A save state that forbids save rerolls and permanently removes the save after its first failure is still needed.
A Fight-phase-start below-Starting-Strength predicate that grants Fights First is still needed.
The led-unit melee Sustained Hits 1 grant is consumed.
Sticky objective control while this unit or its Transport is in range is still needed.
A wargear-based Grenades keyword grant is still needed.
Eligible nearby enemies that Fall Back need forced Desperate Escape tests, with the Battle-shocked modifier and Monster/Vehicle exclusions.
Fight-phase-start forced Battle-shock tests for every enemy unit in Engagement Range are still needed.
PathWitness-backed moved-over enemy selection and per-model mortal wounds are still needed.
Bearer-specific rerolls for Eviscerating Fly-by mortal-wound dice are still needed.
A bearer melee Lance grant is partly parsed and still needs the bearer/weapon entitlement host.
A fixed 6-inch Advance result that replaces the Advance roll is still needed.
Fight-end conditional Transport embarkation needs Ynnari unit-shape, same-turn re-embarkation, capacity, distance, and Engagement Range validation.
The led-unit Sustained Hits grant and Hit modifier are consumed.
Post-deployment redeploy and Strategic Reserves permission are consumed.
The reserve-arrival exclusion is consumed.
Post-shoot riven-target tracking and the friendly Aeldari Strength modifier are consumed.
Opponent-Shooting-phase friendly Infantry selection and the temporary Stealth grant are consumed.
Fight-end eligibility and D3+3-inch Normal/Fall Back movement are consumed through the shared triggered-movement path.
